name: Shinichi Nakagawa
bio: Professor of Evolutionary Biology & Synthesis at the University of Alberta, where he leads COSSEE's Canada Excellence Research Chair program in Open Science and Synthesis in Ecology and Evolution.

name: Eduardo Santos
bio: My name is Eduardo Santos, I am currently a Centre Manager at the Centre for Open Science and Synthesis in Ecology and Evolution at the University of Alberta.

name: Malgorzata (Losia) Lagisz
bio: Works across comparative and meta-analytic projects with strong experience in synthesis-based biology and collaborative methods development.

name: Ayumi Mizuno
bio: Visiting research fellow focused on bird morphology and diet evolution using behavioral experiments and phylogenetic comparative approaches.

name: Marija Purgar Filjak
bio: I joined I-DEEL in February 2026 as a Postdoctoral Scholar after finishing my PhD in marine science in my home country, Croatia.

name: Erick Lundgren
bio: I am an field ecologist and conservation biologist interested in how to understand novel ecosystems.

name: Santiago Ortega
bio: Works on life-history plasticity and comparative pace-of-life questions using Bayesian and meta-analytic methods across taxa.

name: Sergio Poo Hernandez
bio: Computing scientist developing tools for biological research and explainable AI, with prior work in neural network methods for bird data.

name: Christine Sosiak
bio: My research focuses on quantitative methods in paleoecology, new methods of extracting information from the fossil record, and patterns of extinction in insects.

name: Iwo P. Gross
bio: Iwo Gross joined COSSEE in February 2026 shortly after earning his PhD from Auburn University, Alabama, USA.

name: Yefeng Yang
bio: Background in non-visual effects in chickens and welfare optimization; currently contributing to synthesis work on trans-generational effects.

name: Patrice Pottier
bio: Focused on phenotypic plasticity, senescence, and climate change through meta-analytic and synthesis approaches.

name: Anna Lenz
bio: PhD student studying anthropogenic noise pollution and its effects on animal health and ecosystems through evidence synthesis and meta-analysis.

name: Jess Tam
bio: Researches computer vision for species identification and behavior tracking from camera trap imagery and video recordings.

name: Lorenzo Ricolfi
bio: Works in research synthesis and meta-research, including health and environmental effects of PFAS in humans and wildlife.

name: Coralie Williams
bio: Develops meta-analysis tools for ecology, evolution, conservation, and environmental science, with strong applied statistics focus.

name: Kyle Morrison
bio: Kyle's research focus has largely been on evidence syntheses methodologies in environmental sciences including tool/guideline development, methodological, and reporting practices, and elevating the utility of evidence syntheses to inform environmental policy-decisions.

name: Aleksandra Milenovic
bio: Aleksandra Milenović is a first year PhD student of Biological Sciences, and is working as a Teaching Assistant for Introduction to Biological Diversity (BIOL108).

name: Hao Qin
bio: I joined the Collaboration for Open Science and Synthesis in Ecology and Evolution Lab in Jan 2026 as a Master's student.

name: Joseph Cincotta
bio: Researches AI and machine learning approaches for identifying animal behaviour, with extensive software engineering experience.

name: Kelly Wu
bio: I am an undergraduate researcher with COSSEE, currently completing a BSc specializing in Ecology, Evolution, and Environmental Biology at the University of Alberta.

name: Emma Reid
bio: Recipient of an Undergraduate Student Research Award.

name: Dinara Shukayeva
bio: Recipient of an Undergraduate Student Research Award.

name: Mahi Zakir
bio: I joined COSSEE at the University of Alberta in March 2026. I hold an MSc in Computer Science from the University of Alberta and a BSc in Computer Science and Engineering from BRAC University.

name: Jimuel Jr Celeste
bio: Jimuel joined COSSEE in February 2026. It was shortly after obtaining his M.Sc. in Computing Science from the University of Alberta in November 2025.

name: Bhavya Jain
bio: Computing science graduate supporting COSSEE with data extraction and web development at the interface of scientific computing and AI.

name: Elena Gazzea
bio: Visitor working on pollination-dependence meta-analysis with expertise in pollinator ecology and conservation interventions.

name: Aneta Arct
bio: Evolutionary and behavioural ecologist focusing on adaptation to environmental change and global meta-analyses of reproductive strategies in birds.
